title: Trisetella triglochin
taxonomy: Trisetella triglochin is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Trisetella and the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants for support. The genus Trisetella is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which contains many species of orchids found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. Trisetella triglochin is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows in the shade of trees and on rocks. The classification of Trisetella triglochin reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the orchid family.
